title: Summer Vegetable Pasta
description: A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Alice Waters-style summer vegetable pasta: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks.
keywords: alice waters summer vegetable pasta thermomix
intro: Alice Waters's cooking is a beautiful starting point for this Chef Aly Thermomix version of summer vegetable pasta. It keeps the spirit of the dish while making the method simple, metric and practical for TM6 and TM7 home cooks.
ingredients: 500 g main vegetables or protein, prepared
Fresh herbs or lemon, to finish
steps: Place onion and garlic in the mixing bowl and chop 5 sec / speed 5. Scrape down.
Add olive oil and cook 3 min / 120°C / speed 1 to soften the base.
Add the main vegetables or protein, sauce base or stock, salt and pepper. Cook 18 min / 100°C / Reverse / speed 1, with the basket on the lid if reducing.
Check texture and seasoning, then cook 5 min / 100°C / Reverse / speed 1 if it needs a little more time.
Finish with fresh herbs or lemon and rest 3 min / 0°C / no speed before serving.
tips: Cut ingredients evenly so they cook at the same pace in the Thermomix bowl.
Use Reverse for the final cook so the dish stays textured rather than pureed.

faq.q: Can I make Summer Vegetable Pasta in a Thermomix TM6 or TM7?
faq.a: Yes. This version is written with exact Thermomix times, temperatures and speeds for both TM6 and TM7.
Yes. Taste at the end and adjust salt, pepper, lemon or herbs before serving.
